nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as unhelpful or missing nuance

nodes.grounding_span: helping me draft emails or phone call templates

nodes.label: Privacy and sensitivity of information
nodes.grounding_span: Some tasks involve particularly personal or sensitive information and I am mindful not to use AI for those tasks for privacy reasons

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.label_negative: Poor quality AI writing (wordy, terse, lacking warmth)

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer

nodes.label: AI as executive function assistant for ADHD
nodes.label_negative: Struggling with task initiation without AI
nodes.grounding_span: I have ADHD myself and sometimes I get 'tongue tied' when trying to phrase things. AI can help unblock that workflow

nodes.label: AI as complement to human-centered work
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human roles
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that AI will help disability practitioners to be able to support their clients more comprehensively

nodes.label: Effective support for care recipients

nodes.label: Effective professional communication

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency

nodes.label: Personal well-being and reduced cognitive load
nodes.grounding_span: avoids the 'blank page' panic on starting a task that can sometimes hold me back
